race.comment: JUSTACCLAIM (3) backs up quickly from the weekend and should find this a fair bit easier. Blinkers go on to sharpen him up and the added 100m suits. Leading player. FAST TEMPO (4) caught the eye here fresh when rattling home into fourth after turning towards the tail. Drawn low this time, so if he can utilise the gate early he will prove might tough to hold out. SAHHA SWEETIE (8) dug deep to shed her maiden tag last time at Balaklava. Is open to further improvement third-up and can keep the ball rolling. CAER IBORMEITH (9) mixed her form last campaign but has jumped out sharply in readiness and gets in light with the 2kg claim. Including. BELLE FROM HELL (10) didn't fire a shot last time but caught the eye two back when finishing quick at Balaklava. Is one to keep in mind.
